articles.title_en: Nearly 20% of Russian airline fleets grounded this summer — double the normal rate
articles.lead_en: One in five aircraft operated by Russia’s 11 largest airlines is grounded this summer, the Russian business daily Kommersant calculated. Of the 673 aircraft that together account for more than 90% of the country’s passenger traffic, 130 are not flying — 19.3% of the total fleet.
